title: NC State vs. Virginia ACC Tournament Preview
summary: NC State Wolfpack to face Virginia Cavaliers in ACC Tournament quarterfinal in Charlotte, North Carolina on Thursday.
charlotte_impact: Important game for both teams with implications for their tournament standings and national rankings.

title: Shooting at Old Dominion University: 2 Injured, Suspect Dead
summary: Two people were injured and the suspect is deceased following a shooting at Old Dominion University. Victims taken to hospital.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about campus safety and the potential for violence in educational institutions.

title: Firefighters Respond to Shopping Plaza Fire in Matthews
summary: Crews responded to a fire at a shopping plaza on Windsor Crossing Drive in Matthews around 7:30 a.m.
charlotte_impact: Impacts local businesses and potentially disrupts community services; cause of fire needs investigation.

title: Man Drowns After Kayak Accident on Lake Norman
summary: A man drowned after falling from a kayak on Lake Norman. The victim's name has not been released.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the dangers of water activities and the importance of safety precautions.

title: Power Outages Across Carolinas After Strong Storms
summary: Nearly 2,000 Duke Energy customers experienced power outages due to strong storms on Thursday morning.
charlotte_impact: Disrupts daily life and highlights the vulnerability of infrastructure to severe weather.

title: Temperature Drop Followed by Spring-like Weather
summary: A significant temperature drop on Thursday will be followed by a return to average March weather on Friday.
charlotte_impact: Impacts daily planning and activities; signals the transition between winter and spring seasons.

title: Stabbing Incident in North Charlotte Injures One
summary: One person was injured in a stabbing incident along Statesville Avenue in north Charlotte before 7 a.m.
charlotte_impact: Contributes to concerns about crime rates and public safety in the Charlotte area.

title: Serious Crash Near East Charlotte Elementary Schools
summary: Two people sustained life-threatening injuries in a crash in east Charlotte Thursday morning.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about traffic safety, especially near schools, and the potential for severe injuries.

title: Increased Security at New Heights Middle School After Threats
summary: Chesterfield County Sheriff's Office to increase security at New Heights after a student made threatening statements.
charlotte_impact: Addresses concerns about school safety and the need for proactive measures to prevent potential incidents.

title: Suspect Charged with Murder in East Charlotte
summary: A suspect has been charged with murder after a woman was found dead following a welfare check in east Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the severity of violent crime and the ongoing efforts of law enforcement to bring perpetrators to justice.

title: Tips for Managing Spring Allergies
summary: Doctors offer tips to tackle spring allergies amid rising pollen levels as trees begin to bloom.
charlotte_impact: Provides practical advice for managing seasonal allergies, a common health concern.

title: Stein Calls for Reassertion of Tariff Power by Congress
summary: Stein urges Congress to reassert tariff power after Supreme Court ruling limiting presidential authority.
charlotte_impact: Addresses the balance of power between the executive and legislative branches regarding trade policy.

title: Sycamore Brewing Reopening with New Name and Owner
summary: Sycamore Brewing is reopening this weekend under a new name and with a new owner taking over.
charlotte_impact: Indicates changes in the local business landscape and potential new opportunities for growth.

title: Queen City Quarter (Formerly EpiCentre) Expected to Hit Market
summary: Queen City Quarter, formerly EpiCentre in Charlotte, is expected to be listed for sale in the next month.
charlotte_impact: Reflects challenges in the commercial real estate market and potential redevelopment opportunities.

title: Kyle Larson Favored in Las Vegas NASCAR Race
summary: Kyle Larson is the favorite in Sunday's Pennzoil 400 at Las Vegas Motor Speedway, hoping to end a 28-race winless streak.
charlotte_impact: Highlights a local athlete's participation in a major sporting event and his chances of success.
